## Is this a Codex Workflows issue or a platform issue?
<!-- Codex Workflows is a plugin. Some reported "bugs" are actually issues
     in Codex itself or in the underlying model/runtime. If you're not
     sure, try
     reproducing without Codex Workflows installed.

     If the problem persists without Codex Workflows, file the issue with
     Codex or the relevant upstream runtime instead. -->

- [ ] I confirmed this issue does not occur without Codex Workflows installed
